subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been revealed by the Wronged One for him who hath turned unto the Countenance and desireth to quaff the Choice Sealed Wine from the hand of his Lord's bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن توجه الی الوجه و اراد ان یشرب الرحیق المختوم من ید عطاء ربه
